description:
Goal:
Create the repo-level documents that define what this project is and what it refuses to do.

Scope:
- README.md
- LICENSE decision note or LICENSE if chosen
- DISCLAIMER.md
- ACCEPTABLE_USE.md
- SECURITY.md
- CONTRIBUTING.md skeleton
- docs/architecture.md skeleton

Acceptance:
- Clearly states local-first/self-hosted privacy model.
- Clearly states not legal advice.
- Clearly forbids SSN collection, third-party removals, CAPTCHA solving, and credit-bureau/FCRA automation.
- Clearly states no removal guarantees.
- Defines honest status language.
- Does not include app implementation code.
title: Initialize repo policy and project docs
